texto: The devil will never rest, nor sleep, nor turn his head from you. He will find every fault, every weakness, every discrepancy he can magnify, expand and contort every sin to cause you to abort your mission here; to cause you to feel like a worthless, ignoble, useless, piece of garbage to get you to fail in your task that God has for you. So what are you going to do about it?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Garrett Fredlund: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The devil will never rest, nor sleep, nor turn his head from you. He will find every fault, every…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, adversity, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
